info.title: Nuvo Public API
info.description:
# Nuvo Public API

The Nuvo Public API allows you to programmatically interact with Nuvo services.

## Authentication

All API requests require authentication using an API key. Include your API key in the `Authorization` header using the Bearer scheme:

```
Authorization: Bearer sk_prod_your_api_key_here
```

API keys are environment-specific and prefixed accordingly:
- **Staging**: `sk_stg_`
- **Production**: `sk_prod_`

## API Versioning

Specify the API version using the `Nuvo-API-Version` header. This header is required for all API requests.

```
Nuvo-API-Version: 01-05-2026
```

Currently supported versions: `01-05-2026`

## Support

For API support, please contact your Nuvo representative or Customer Success team.

get.description:
Healthcheck endpoint to check API availability and authentication.

This endpoint can be used to verify that:
1. The API is accessible
2. Your API key is valid
3. Authentication is working correctly

Returns:
    HealthcheckResponse with status=True if the API is healthy

List customers.

Returns a paginated list of customers (buyer companies) that have a
relationship with your organization.

## Pagination

Results are ordered by creation date (newest first). Use cursor-based
pagination with the `after` parameter.

parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Returns results after this customer ID.

schema.title: After
schema.description: Cursor for pagination. Returns results after this customer ID.

parameters.name: after

post.description:
Create a new customer.

Creates a new customer record with their company information and starts
a credit application. The customer will be invited to complete the
application via email if configured in your settings.

## Response

Returns the created customer object with IDs for the customer and application.

get.description:
Get a customer by ID.

Returns the customer (buyer company) with the specified ID if it has a
relationship with your organization. If the provided id is an alias of a
canonical customer, returns a short `{id, aliases}` object pointing at the
canonical id so the client can re-issue the request against it.

## Errors

- **400 Bad Request**: The provided id is not a valid customer id.
- **404 Not Found**: The customer does not exist or does not belong to your organization.

schema.title: Response Get Customer Customers  Customer Id  Get

post.description:
Update internal fields and customer ID for an existing customer.

Updates the customer application's internal fields and/or customer ID for the specified customer.

## Errors

- **400 Bad Request**: Internal fields are not configured, or provided section/field keys are invalid,
  or customer ID cannot be set because an ERP integration is connected.
- **404 Not Found**: The customer does not exist or does not belong to your organization.

line1.title: Line1
line1.description: Address line 1 (e.g., street, PO Box, or company name).

line2.title: Line2
line2.description: Address line 2 (e.g., apartment, suite, unit, or building).

city.title: City
city.description: City, district, suburb, town, or village.

AddressParam.title: AddressParam
AddressParam.description: Address object for billing, shipping, or company addresses.

title.title: Title
title.description: Job title or role of the contact.

ContactParam.title: ContactParam
ContactParam.description:
Contact information for the person who will receive the credit application.
This is the primary point of contact on the customer side.

legal_name.title: Legal Name
legal_name.description: The customer company's legal business name.

configuration_slug.title: Configuration Slug
configuration_slug.description: The slug identifier for the credit application configuration to use.

primary_address.title: Primary Address
primary_address.description: Primary business address for the customer company.

sales_representative_id.title: Sales Representative Id
sales_representative_id.description: ID of the sales representative to assign to this customer. The user must have the SALES_REP or SALES_MANAGER role in your organization.

netsuite.title: Netsuite
netsuite.description: NetSuite integration fields for linking to customer records.

internal_fields.title: Internal Fields
internal_fields.description: Internal fields for storing additional information, organized by section. Format: {section_key: {field_key: value}}. Section and field keys must match your configured internal fields schema.

CreateCustomerRequest.title: CreateCustomerRequest
CreateCustomerRequest.description:
Request body for creating a customer.

Creates a new customer with their company information, primary contact,
and optionally pre-fills application data.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the customer was created.

configuration_slug.title: Configuration Slug
configuration_slug.description: The slug identifier for the credit application configuration.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current status of the customer application.

internal_fields.title: Internal Fields
internal_fields.description: Internal fields values organized by section. Null if internal fields are not configured. Fields without values are returned as null within their section structure.

customer_id.title: Customer Id
customer_id.description: Custom customer ID assigned to this customer, if any.

application_link.title: Application Link
application_link.description: URL link to the credit application for the customer to complete.

CreateCustomerResponse.title: CreateCustomerResponse
CreateCustomerResponse.description:
Response object for a created customer. Includes all CustomerResponse fields
plus the application link.

id.title: Id
id.description: The alias id that was requested.

aliases.title: Aliases
aliases.description: The canonical customer id this alias resolves to.

CustomerAliasResponse.title: CustomerAliasResponse
CustomerAliasResponse.description:
Returned from GET /customers/{id} when the requested id is an alias for a
canonical customer. Clients should re-issue the request against
the `aliases` id to fetch the full customer payload.

primary_address.title: Primary Address
primary_address.description: Primary business address for the company.

CustomerCompanyResponse.title: CustomerCompanyResponse
CustomerCompanyResponse.description: Company information nested within customer response.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the customer was created.

configuration_slug.title: Configuration Slug
configuration_slug.description: The slug identifier for the credit application configuration.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current status of the customer application.

internal_fields.title: Internal Fields
internal_fields.description: Internal fields values organized by section. Null if internal fields are not configured. Fields without values are returned as null within their section structure.

customer_id.title: Customer Id
customer_id.description: Custom customer ID assigned to this customer, if any.

CustomerResponse.title: CustomerResponse
CustomerResponse.description: Customer object returned in list and get responses.

HealthcheckResponse.title: HealthcheckResponse
HealthcheckResponse.description: Response model for the healthcheck endpoint.

has_more.title: Has More
has_more.description: Whether there are more results available after this set.

customer_id.title: Customer Id
customer_id.description: NetSuite internal customer ID. This will be used to associate the Nuvo customer with the existing NetSuite customer record.

NetSuiteParam.title: NetSuiteParam
NetSuiteParam.description:
NetSuite integration fields.
Used to link this customer to a NetSuite customer record.

internal_fields.title: Internal Fields
internal_fields.description: Internal fields for this customer, organized by section. Format: {section_key: {field_key: value}}. Section and field keys must match your configured internal fields schema.

customer_id.title: Customer Id
customer_id.description: Customer ID to assign to this customer. This is the same ID shown in the 'Assign Customer ID' modal. Cannot be set if the supplier has an ERP integration connected.

UpdateCustomerRequest.title: UpdateCustomerRequest
UpdateCustomerRequest.description:
Request body for updating an existing customer.

Internal fields and customer ID can be updated through this endpoint.

BearerAuth.description: API key for authenticating requests. Format: `nuvo_sk_<env>_<key>`
